metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: ASIM Authentication parser for VMware vCenter
properties.query:
let parser = (disabled: bool = false, pack: bool = false) {
  let EventSeverityLookup = datatable (EventOriginalSeverity: string, EventSeverity: string) [
      "info", "Informational"
  ];
  let EventTypeLookup = datatable (EventOriginalType: string, EventType: string) [
      "vim.event.UserLoginSessionEvent", "Logon",
      "vim.event.UserLogoutSessionEvent", "LogOff"
  ];
  let LoginEvents = (T: (Message: string)) {
      T
      | where Message has "UserLoginSessionEvent"
      | parse Message with * "Event [" EventOriginalUid:string "] [1-1] [" EventTime:datetime "] [" EventOriginalType:string "] [" EventOriginalSeverity:string "]" * "[User " ActorUsername:string "@" SrcIpAddr:string " logged in as " HttpUserAgent:string "]" *;
  };
  let LogoutEvents = (T: (Message: string)) {
      T
      | where Message has "UserLogoutSessionEvent"
      | parse Message with * "Event [" EventOriginalUid: string "] [1-1] [" EventTime: datetime "] [" EventOriginalType: string "] [" EventOriginalSeverity:string "]" * "[User " ActorUsername:string "@" SrcIpAddr " logged out (login time:" LoginTime: string ", number of API invocations: " APIInvocationCount: string ", user agent:" HttpUserAgent: string ")]" *;
  };
  let vCenterLogs = vcenter_CL
  | where not(disabled);
  union
      LoginEvents(vCenterLogs), LogoutEvents(vCenterLogs)
      | extend
          EventVendor = "VMware",
          EventProduct = "vCenter",
          EventSchema = "Authentication",
          EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
          Type = "vcenter_CL",
          EventStartTime = EventTime,
          EventEndTime = EventTime,
          EventCount = coalesce(toint(APIInvocationCount), int(1)),
          ActorUsernameType = "Simple",
          EventResult = "Success"
      | lookup EventTypeLookup on EventOriginalType
      | lookup EventSeverityLookup on EventOriginalSeverity
      | project-rename
          EventOriginalResultDetails = Message
      | extend
          AdditionalFields = iff(pack, bag_pack("LoginTime", LoginTime), dynamic([])),
          IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
          Dvc = EventProduct
      | project
          TimeGenerated,
          Type,
          EventVendor,
          EventProduct,
          EventSchema,
          EventSchemaVersion,
          EventStartTime,
          EventEndTime,
          EventCount,
          ActorUsernameType,
          EventResult,
          EventOriginalType,
          EventType,
          EventOriginalSeverity,
          EventOriginalResultDetails,
          EventOriginalUid,
          ActorUsername,
          SrcIpAddr,
          HttpUserAgent,
          AdditionalFields,
          IpAddr,
          Dvc;
};
parser(disabled=disabled, pack=pack)
